item.text: I‚Äôm checking the code paths that build `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial` and the `AuditSink` implementations directly from the workspace, using shell search so every item is grounded in the current commit.
I‚Äôve got the candidate files. Next I‚Äôm opening the exact call sites so I can separate real constructors from read-only matches and name each `AuditSink` implementor precisely.

I‚Äôve confirmed one example file only reads the event, not constructs it. I‚Äôm doing one wider pass for any `PolicyDenial {` constructors that might use an imported variant name instead of the fully qualified path.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: `AgentLoop` emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial` when a requested tool is not in the allowlist before dispatch.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink` synthesizes a `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial` when it intercepts a denied `ToolCallRequested` event.

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
